name: Mythical Mayhem
short_description: Escape to the realm of Mythical Mayhem! Recruit heroes and put your deck building skills to the test. Defeat unique arch villains and their monstrous henchmen with your team of heroes. Save the realm and thwart the ambitions of evil.
detailed_description:
Mythical Mayhem is a fantasy deck building game. It is fully released with a robust campaign mode, tutorials, many scenarios and the ability to create a custom game with all of your unlocked content.

Game Features

  • Fantasy strategy deck building game
  • Recruit Heroes
  • Defeat Foe's and Arch Villains in combat that has a random element
  • Single Player
  • Custom game allowing you to choose your decks
  • Campaign Mode
  • Realm Balance
  • 4 Difficulty Settings
  • 5 Tutorials
  • Many different ways to play

Deck Listing

  • 8 Generic Unnamed Hero Decks
  • 32 Named Hero Decks
  • 9 Side Quest Card
  • 22 Quest Cards
  • 10 Gear Cards
  • 11 Relic Cards
  • 14 Dark Sagas
  • 10 Dark Sagas Chapter Card Variations
  • 23 Arch Villain Decks
  • 8 Arch Villain Ambition Card Variations
  • 28 Foe Decks
  • 19 Minion Decks
  • 35 Scenarios
  • 5 Benefactor Cards
  • 9 Drinking Deck Cards
